titleStmt.title: SII 39.27: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 27. (A.R. No. 27 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE ON THE EAST WALL OF MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SHRINETRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYADĒVA, ‘WHO WAS PLEASED TO RESTORE THE CHŌḺA COUNTRY’ 20+1 = 21ST YEAR (= 1237 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of land measured by 18 feet sānkōl to a Sivabrāhmaṇa of the temple with instruction to remit a fixed quantity of paddy and kāśu for the maintenance of the temple at Tiruttiyūr-Muṭṭam, by Māḷavamāṇikkam-Tirukāṇappēruḍaiyāṉ alias Mālavachakravarti. It was originally given to the donor by a Sivabrāhmaṇa of Semboṉmāri in Talaiyūr-nāḍu. The taxes like Silvari, Perivari, Vettimuṭṭāvāl, Kīḻveṭṭi and Paramai etc were exempted before donating the same land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya cuṉtarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu [2 10] Etirāmāṇṭu
māḷavamāṇikkam tirukkāṉap peruṭaiyāṉāṉa māḷavaccakkaravattiyeṉ tāḻaiyūrnāṭṭu cempoṉ māric civappirāma
ṇaṉ māḷavamāṇikkam tirukkāṉap peruṭaiyāṉukku nām kāṇi ceyetu kuṭutta Ūrāvatu tiruttiyūr muṭṭappaṟṟil Eṅkaḷ
paṟṟil k kuḷattu ḷruvaṉ maṭaiyālum paṭṭaṉ kuḷamān pulikku puṭi nallūrum naṭuviley palar
valla kum Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟ kellai pākar kuṭi Ellaikku mellelaikku mēṟkkum teṉpāṟku El
laikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Iviḷuruvan cey paṟṟul kiḻellaikkum Āviraṅkuṭaiyāṉ ku
Ellaikkukuṭivayal kīḻellaikku kiḻakku vaṭapārkkellai Aṇaika kavitaṅkaḷukku teṟkum Āka vicaiṉta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷ va
ṭṭa nilattil tevarkūṟu niṅkalāka nam kūṟāṉa nilam cem pātiyūm Iṉṉilattil meṉokkiya maramum kiṉokkiya kiṇaṟum nir nilamum
caiyum nattamum nattappāḻum teṟṟiyum yum Āmai tavaḻiyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Ivaṉu
cetu kuṭuttom Inta nilam tiruttiyūr muṭṭattu ya nāyaṉāṟkuttiruppaṭi māṟṟukku patiṉeṇcāṇ ko
lāl Aḷavupukka nilam Oru māvukku kāl māḷavarmāṇikkattāl- mai nellu Iru kalaṉe tūṇiyum māttāl Irupattañcu
putu m Ippaṭi cantirātitarvaṟ celvatākavum Ūrāṭci taṭik kuṟuṇi cevakap peṟu kaṉmikaḷ kaṇakap peṟu kaṇmikaḷ kaṇakkappeṟu maṟṟu Iṭai
ṉṟa cilvari, peruvariveṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ kiḻveṭṭi paṟaimai maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavum tavintom koṭai kuṟuvai Uḷpaṭa Iṉne
llum Ikkācum Iṟuttu Ikkoyil tirutiracimāheśvarar kaiyāle tīrvu koḷka Ippaṭi cantirātitarvaṟ celvatāka kalveṭṭikkuṭut
tom māḷavar māṇikkam tirukkāṉapperuṭaiyārāṉa māḷavaccakravattiyeṉ māḷavar māṇikkam tirukkāṉapperuṭaiyāṉukku §
Digital edition of SII 39.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
